controls.control_objective: To ensure be called the reserve bank of india (all india financial institutions - concentration risk management) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (All India Financial Institutions
- Concentration Risk Management) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be called the reserve bank of india (all india financial institutions - concentration risk management) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure come into effect immediately upon issuance
controls.control_description: These Directions shall come into effect immediately upon issuance.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to come into effect immediately upon issuance

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to all india financial institutions (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'aifis' and individually as an 'aifi') viz
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be applicable to All India Financial Institutions (hereinafter
collectively referred to as 'AIFIs' and individually as an 'AIFI') viz.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to all india financial institutions (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'aifis' and individually as an 'aifi') viz

controls.control_objective: To ensure bear the meaning as assigned to them in the ensuing paragraphs
controls.control_description:
In these Directions, unless the context states otherwise, the terms herein shall bear the
meaning as assigned to them in the ensuing paragraphs.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to bear the meaning as assigned to them in the ensuing paragraphs

controls.control_objective: To ensure a system provider, who by way of novation interposes between system participants in the transactions admitted for settlement, thereby becoming the buy
controls.control_description:
(1)"Central counterparty" or "CCP" means a system provider, who by way of novation
interposes between system participants in the transactions admitted for settlement,
thereby becoming the buyer to every seller and the seller to every buyer, for the purpose
of effecting settlement of their transactions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a system provider, who by way of novation interposes between system participants in the transactions admitted for settlement, thereby becoming the buy

controls.control_objective: To ensure a member of, or a direct participant in, a ccp that is entitled to enter into a transaction with the ccp, regardless of whether it enters into trades
controls.control_description:
(2)"Clearing member" means a member of, or a direct participant in, a CCP that is entitled
to enter into a transaction with the CCP, regardless of whether it enters into trades with
a CCP for its own hedging, investment or speculative purposes or whether it also enters
into trades as a financial intermediary between the CCP and other market participants.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a member of, or a direct participant in, a ccp that is entitled to enter into a transaction with the ccp, regardless of whether it enters into trades

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as have been assigned to them under the banking regulation act, 1949 or the reserve bank of india act, 1934 or the companies act
controls.control_description:
All other expressions, unless defined herein, shall have the same meaning as have been
assigned to them under the Banking Regulation Act, 1949 or the Reserve Bank of India
Act, 1934 or the Companies Act, 2013, or any statutory modification or re-enactment
thereto or other regulations issued by the Reserve Bank of India or the Glossary of Terms
published by Reserve Bank or as used in commercial parlance, as the case may be.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as have been assigned to them under the banking regulation act, 1949 or the reserve bank of india act, 1934 or the companies act

controls.control_objective: To ensure formulate comprehensive board-approved policies on the large exposures framework that, inter alia, include provisions: (1) to determine credit exposur
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to formulate comprehensive board-approved policies on the large exposures framework that, inter alia, include provisions: (1) to determine credit exposur

controls.control_objective: To ensure be permitted
controls.control_description:
(2) conditions under which exposure beyond 20 per cent of its eligible capital base to a
single counterparty shall be permitted;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be permitted

controls.control_objective: To ensure place an annual review of the implementation of exposure management measures before the board by the end of june (september in the case of nhb)
controls.control_description:
Additionally, an AIFI shall place an annual review of the implementation of exposure
management measures before the Board by the end of June (September in the case of
NHB).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to place an annual review of the implementation of exposure management measures before the board by the end of june (september in the case of nhb)

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply the large exposure norms on an ongoing basis and in the same manner as applied for the risk-based capital requirements, i
controls.control_description:
An AIFI shall apply the large exposure norms on an ongoing basis and in the same
manner as applied for the risk-based capital requirements, i.e.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply the large exposure norms on an ongoing basis and in the same manner as applied for the risk-based capital requirements, i

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to the exposure limits as prescribed in section d of this chapter
controls.control_description:
An AIFI's exposure to all its counterparties shall be subject to the exposure limits as
prescribed in Section D of this Chapter, except for those listed below:
(1) The refinance portfolios of the AIFI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be subject to the exposure limits as prescribed in section d of this chapter

controls.control_objective: To ensure frame a policy approved by its board to determine credit exposure limits in respect of its refinancing portfolio
controls.control_description:
Provided that the AIFI shall frame a policy approved by its Board to determine credit
exposure limits in respect of its refinancing portfolio.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to frame a policy approved by its board to determine credit exposure limits in respect of its refinancing portfolio

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to supervisory scrutiny
controls.control_description:
The policy framed and
assessments made under such a policy shall be subject to supervisory scrutiny.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be subject to supervisory scrutiny

controls.control_objective: To ensure be higher than 20 per cent of the aifi's available eligible capital base at all times
controls.control_description:
The sum of all the exposure values of an AIFI to a single counterparty shall not be higher
than 20 per cent of the AIFI's available eligible capital base at all times.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be higher than 20 per cent of the aifi's available eligible capital base at all times

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place a specific board-approved policy setting out conditions under which exposure beyond 20 per cent may be considered
controls.control_description:
Provided that Board of the AIFI may allow additional five per cent exposure beyond 20 per
cent but at no time higher than 25 per cent of the AIFI's eligible capital base, subject to the
following conditions:
(1) the AIFI shall put in place a specific Board-approved policy setting out
conditions under which exposure beyond 20 per cent may be considered;
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to put in place a specific board-approved policy setting out conditions under which exposure beyond 20 per cent may be considered

controls.control_objective: To ensure record in writing the exceptional reasons for which exposure beyond 20 per cent is being allowed for each specific case
controls.control_description:
and
(2) the AIFI shall record in writing the exceptional reasons for which exposure
beyond 20 per cent is being allowed for each specific case.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to record in writing the exceptional reasons for which exposure beyond 20 per cent is being allowed for each specific case

controls.control_objective: To ensure exceed the exposure limit by five per cent of its tier-i capital for exposure to a single counterparty
controls.control_description:
Provided further that the AIFI may exceed the exposure limit by five per cent of its Tier-I
capital for exposure to a single counterparty, if the additional exposure is on account of
infrastructure 'loan and / or investment'.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to exceed the exposure limit by five per cent of its tier-i capital for exposure to a single counterparty

controls.control_objective: To ensure exceed 25 per cent in any case for the aifi
controls.control_description:
Provided further that single counterparty limit shall not exceed 25 per cent in any
case for the AIFI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to exceed 25 per cent in any case for the aifi

controls.control_objective: To ensure be higher than 25 per cent of the aifi's available eligible capital base at all times
controls.control_description:
The sum of all exposure values of an AIFI to a group of connected counterparties shall
not be higher than 25 per cent of the AIFI's available eligible capital base at all times.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be higher than 25 per cent of the aifi's available eligible capital base at all times

controls.control_objective: To ensure an aifi may exceed the exposure limit by 10 per cent of its tier i capital for exposure to a group of connected counterparties
controls.control_description:
<image>
Provided that an AIFI may exceed the exposure limit by 10 per cent of its Tier I capital for
exposure to a group of connected counterparties, if the additional exposure is on account
of infrastructure 'loan and / or investment'.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to an aifi may exceed the exposure limit by 10 per cent of its tier i capital for exposure to a group of connected counterparties

controls.control_objective: To ensure have exposures to a group of counterparties with specific relationships or dependencies such that, were one of the counterparties to fail, all of the
controls.control_description:
In some cases, an AIFI may have exposures to a group of counterparties with specific
relationships or dependencies such that, were one of the counterparties to fail, all of the
counterparties would very likely fail.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have exposures to a group of counterparties with specific relationships or dependencies such that, were one of the counterparties to fail, all of the

controls.control_objective: To ensure be treated as a single counterparty
controls.control_description:
Such a group of connected counterparties shall be
treated as a single counterparty.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be treated as a single counterparty

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to the exposure limits, as mentioned in section d
controls.control_description:
The sum of the AIFI's exposure to all the individual entities
included within a group of connected counterparties shall be subject to the exposure limits,
as mentioned in Section D.2 above, and to the regulatory reporting requirements.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be subject to the exposure limits, as mentioned in section d

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed to be a group of connected counterparties if at least one of the following criteria is satisfied: (1) control relationship: one of the count
controls.control_description:
Two or more natural or legal persons shall be deemed to be a group of connected
counterparties if at least one of the following criteria is satisfied:
(1) Control relationship: one of the counterparties, directly or indirectly, has control
over the other(s) or the counterparties are, directly or indirectly, controlled by a third
party (an AIFI may or may not have exposure towards this third party).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed to be a group of connected counterparties if at least one of the following criteria is satisfied: (1) control relationship: one of the count

controls.control_objective: To ensure identify possible connected counterparties on the basis of economic interdependence in all cases where the sum of all exposures to one individual coun
controls.control_description:
Provided that in order to avoid cases where a thorough investigation of economic
interdependencies will not be proportionate to the size of the exposures, the AIFI
shall identify possible connected counterparties on the basis of economic
interdependence in all cases where the sum of all exposures to one individual
counterparty exceeds five per cent of the eligible capital base, and not in other
cases.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to identify possible connected counterparties on the basis of economic interdependence in all cases where the sum of all exposures to one individual coun

controls.control_objective: To ensure assess the relationship amongst counterparties with reference to paragraphs 14 i(1) and i(2) above
controls.control_description:
In order to establish the existence of a group of connected counterparties, the AIFI shall
assess the relationship amongst counterparties with reference to paragraphs 14 i(1) and
i(2) above.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to assess the relationship amongst counterparties with reference to paragraphs 14 i(1) and i(2) above

controls.control_objective: To ensure automatically consider that the control relationship criterion [paragraph 14(1)] is satisfied
controls.control_description:
Provided that if one entity owns more than 50 per cent of the voting rights of the other entity,
the AIFI shall automatically consider that the control relationship criterion [paragraph 14(1)]
is satisfied.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to automatically consider that the control relationship criterion [paragraph 14(1)] is satisfied

controls.control_objective: To ensure assess connectedness between counterparties based on 'control' using the following evidences:
controls.control_description:
Provided further that the AIFI shall assess connectedness between counterparties based
on 'control' using the following evidences:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to assess connectedness between counterparties based on 'control' using the following evidences:

controls.control_objective: To ensure also assess the above criteria with respect to a common third party (such as holding company), irrespective of whether the aifi has exposure to that e
controls.control_description:
(iv) The AIFI shall also assess the above criteria with respect to a common third
party (such as holding company), irrespective of whether the AIFI has
exposure to that entity or not.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also assess the above criteria with respect to a common third party (such as holding company), irrespective of whether the aifi has exposure to that e

controls.control_objective: To ensure also refer to criteria specified in the extant accounting standards for further qualitative guidance when determining control
controls.control_description:
The AIFI shall also refer to criteria specified in the extant accounting standards for
further qualitative guidance when determining control.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also refer to criteria specified in the extant accounting standards for further qualitative guidance when determining control

controls.control_objective: To ensure also examine cases where clients have common owners, shareholders or managers
controls.control_description:
While determining control relationship, an AIFI shall also examine cases where clients
have common owners, shareholders or managers;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also examine cases where clients have common owners, shareholders or managers

controls.control_objective: To ensure be pursuant to a contract concluded between the undertakings, or to provisions in the memoranda or articles of association of those undertakings, or i
controls.control_description:
This management may be pursuant to a contract concluded
between the undertakings, or to provisions in the memoranda or articles of association of
those undertakings, or if the administrative management or supervisory bodies of the
<image>
undertaking and of one or more other undertakings consist, for the major part, of the same
persons.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be pursuant to a contract concluded between the undertakings, or to provisions in the memoranda or articles of association of those undertakings, or i

controls.control_objective: To ensure have an option to demonstrate to the rbi (e
controls.control_description:
Where control has been established based on any of the above criteria, in exceptional
cases, an AIFI shall have an option to demonstrate to the RBI (e.g., existence of control
between counterparties due to specific circumstances and corporate governance
safeguards) that such control does not necessarily result in the entities concerned
constituting a group of connected counterparties.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have an option to demonstrate to the rbi (e

controls.control_objective: To ensure consider, at a minimum, the following criteria: (1) where 50 per cent or more of one counterparty's gross receipts or gross expenditures (on an annual
controls.control_description:
In establishing connectedness based on economic interdependence, the AIFI shall
consider, at a minimum, the following criteria:
(1) Where 50 per cent or more of one counterparty's gross receipts or gross
expenditures (on an annual basis) is derived from transactions with the other
counterparty;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to consider, at a minimum, the following criteria: (1) where 50 per cent or more of one counterparty's gross receipts or gross expenditures (on an annual

controls.control_objective: To ensure , and the exposure is so significant that the guarantor is likely to default if a claim occurs
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , and the exposure is so significant that the guarantor is likely to default if a claim occurs

controls.control_objective: To ensure be serviced and fully repaid
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be serviced and fully repaid

controls.control_objective: To ensure , and the exposure is so significant that the guarantor is likely to default if a claim occurs
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , and the exposure is so significant that the guarantor is likely to default if a claim occurs

controls.control_objective: To ensure consider parameters like networth, ebitda, liquid assets, etc
controls.control_description:
The AIFI may consider parameters
like networth, EBITDA, liquid assets, etc., to assess whether the guarantor
will be in a position to honour the claim on an on-going basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to consider parameters like networth, ebitda, liquid assets, etc

controls.control_objective: To ensure remain unsold and could lead to default in loan repayment by a
controls.control_description:
Illustrative Example: When a significant part of product / output / services
of Company A is sold to Company B and there are no alternate buyers who
can be approached if B fails to buy, in such a case goods may remain unsold
and could lead to default in loan repayment by A.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to remain unsold and could lead to default in loan repayment by a

controls.control_objective: To ensure use financial criteria like unsold inventory leading to operating loss / default in repayment as well as subjective criteria like ability of the selle
controls.control_description:
For deciding if the criteria would be applicable
to the counterparties under consideration, the AIFI may use financial criteria
like unsold inventory leading to operating loss / default in repayment as well
as subjective criteria like ability of the seller to find alternate buyer / market,
R&D capability of the seller, etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to use financial criteria like unsold inventory leading to operating loss / default in repayment as well as subjective criteria like ability of the selle

controls.control_objective: To ensure be serviced and fully repaid
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be serviced and fully repaid

controls.control_objective: To ensure consider factors like financial strength of counterparty b to withstand the shock, its ability to find alternate supplier in place of c, etc
controls.control_description:
The AIFI may consider factors like
financial strength of counterparty B to withstand the shock, its ability to find
alternate supplier in place of C, etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to consider factors like financial strength of counterparty b to withstand the shock, its ability to find alternate supplier in place of c, etc

controls.control_objective: To ensure lead to the insolvency or default of the other companies
controls.control_description:
Illustrative Example: Examples would include all such cases where
insolvency or default of one company may lead to the insolvency or default
of the other companies.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to lead to the insolvency or default of the other companies

controls.control_objective: To ensure use criteria such as intercorporate liabilities, significant trade receivables, etc
controls.control_description:
The AIFI may use criteria such as intercorporate
liabilities, significant trade receivables, etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to use criteria such as intercorporate liabilities, significant trade receivables, etc

controls.control_objective: To ensure have access to <image> alternative sources of funds
controls.control_description:
Illustrative Example: Company A and Company B rely on the same non-
AIFI source for their funding requirements and may not have access to
<image>
alternative sources of funds.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have access to <image> alternative sources of funds

controls.control_objective: To ensure cause payment difficulties to dependent entity (c)
controls.control_description:
(2) Economic interdependence with two different entities: If an entity (C) is
economically dependent on two (or more) other entities (A and B) then payment
difficulty of any one of the entities (A or B) may cause payment difficulties to
dependent entity (C).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to cause payment difficulties to dependent entity (c)

controls.control_objective: To ensure be circumstances where some of these criteria do not automatically imply an economic dependence that results in two or more counterparties being conne
controls.control_description:
However, it is possible that there shall be circumstances where some of these criteria
do not automatically imply an economic dependence that results in two or more
counterparties being connected.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be circumstances where some of these criteria do not automatically imply an economic dependence that results in two or more counterparties being conne

controls.control_objective: To ensure be required to combine these counterparties to form a group of connected counterparties
controls.control_description:
In such a scenario, the AIFI shall not be required to
combine these counterparties to form a group of connected counterparties.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be required to combine these counterparties to form a group of connected counterparties

controls.control_objective: To ensure be able to overcome financial difficulties, or even the second counterparty's default, by finding alternative business partners or funding sources wit
controls.control_description:
Provided that the AIFI can demonstrate that a counterparty which is economically closely
related to another counterparty shall be able to overcome financial difficulties, or even the
second counterparty's default, by finding alternative business partners or funding sources
within an appropriate time period.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be able to overcome financial difficulties, or even the second counterparty's default, by finding alternative business partners or funding sources wit

controls.control_objective: To ensure be situations where the two types of dependencies are interlinked and could therefore exist within one group of connected counterparties in such a way
controls.control_description:
However, there may be situations where
the two types of dependencies are interlinked and could therefore exist within one group of
connected counterparties in such a way that all relevant clients constitute a single risk.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be situations where the two types of dependencies are interlinked and could therefore exist within one group of connected counterparties in such a way

controls.control_objective: To ensure be part of two separate groups of a and b
controls.control_description:
In this case, B1 should be part of two
separate groups of A and B.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be part of two separate groups of a and b

controls.control_objective: To ensure be sufficient as financial difficulties of a2 is likely to cause difficulties for b1 also which is economically dependent on a2 (which in turn is depe
controls.control_description:
(i) Three different groups of i) A, A1, A2, ii) B, B1, iii) A2, B1, may not be sufficient
as financial difficulties of A2 is likely to cause difficulties for B1 also which is
economically dependent on A2 (which in turn is dependent on A).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be sufficient as financial difficulties of a2 is likely to cause difficulties for b1 also which is economically dependent on a2 (which in turn is depe

controls.control_objective: To ensure that financial difficulty at either entity could impact the other entity
controls.control_description:
both are economically dependent on each other, which means that
financial difficulty at either entity could impact the other entity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to that financial difficulty at either entity could impact the other entity

controls.control_objective: To ensure be assumed when an entity is economically dependent on another entity and is itself the head of a 'control group'
controls.control_description:
(i) Downstream Contagion: Downstream contagion should be assumed when an
entity is economically dependent on another entity and is itself the head of a 'control
group'.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be assumed when an entity is economically dependent on another entity and is itself the head of a 'control group'

controls.control_objective: To ensure then be included in the group of connected counterparties to which the economic dependency relationship exists
controls.control_description:
If the other entity is part of a group of connected clients, the control group of
the economically dependent entity should then be included in the group of connected
counterparties to which the economic dependency relationship exists.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to then be included in the group of connected counterparties to which the economic dependency relationship exists

controls.control_objective: To ensure impact b1 adversely, which then is likely to withdraw resources from its controlled entities b2 and b3
controls.control_description:
If A2 faces financial
difficulty, it may impact B1 adversely, which then is likely to withdraw resources from
its controlled entities B2 and B3.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to impact b1 adversely, which then is likely to withdraw resources from its controlled entities b2 and b3

controls.control_objective: To ensure be assumed only when the controlling entity is also economically dependent on the entity that constitutes the economic link between the two controllin
controls.control_description:
(ii) Upstream Contagion: On the other hand, upstream contagion of entities that
control the economically dependent entity should be assumed only when the
controlling entity is also economically dependent on the entity that constitutes the
economic link between the two controlling groups.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be assumed only when the controlling entity is also economically dependent on the entity that constitutes the economic link between the two controllin

controls.control_objective: To ensure be difficult to accurately form group of connected counterparties
controls.control_description:
(iii) Limitations in formulating groups of connected counterparties: If an AIFI is not
having exposure to all the entities, it may be difficult to accurately form group of
connected counterparties.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be difficult to accurately form group of connected counterparties

controls.control_objective: To ensure be formed on best efforts basis and the aifi should take reasonable steps to collect and use relevant information
controls.control_description:
Such groups shall be formed on best efforts basis and
the AIFI should take reasonable steps to collect and use relevant information;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be formed on best efforts basis and the aifi should take reasonable steps to collect and use relevant information

controls.control_objective: To ensure be difficult for the aifi to formulate correct groupings
controls.control_description:
If there are interconnections
among entities that are not clients of the AIFI, it may be difficult for the AIFI to
formulate correct groupings.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be difficult for the aifi to formulate correct groupings

controls.control_objective: To ensure be available to it publicly or through other clients or entities outside its clientele
controls.control_description:
However, the AIFI should incorporate any information
that may be available to it publicly or through other clients or entities outside its
clientele.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be available to it publicly or through other clients or entities outside its clientele

controls.control_objective: To ensure be difficult to formulate correct groupings
controls.control_description:
For instance, in illustration shown below, if an AIFI has exposure to A and B5 only,
then it may be difficult to formulate correct groupings.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be difficult to formulate correct groupings

controls.control_objective: To ensure frame a board-approved policy for determining connectedness using the criteria mentioned above
controls.control_description:
The AIFI shall frame a Board-approved policy for determining connectedness using the
criteria mentioned above.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to frame a board-approved policy for determining connectedness using the criteria mentioned above

controls.control_objective: To ensure constitute both on and off-balance sheet exposures which shall be calculated according to the method prescribed for capital computation under reserve
controls.control_description:
An exposure to a counterparty shall constitute both on and off-balance sheet exposures
which shall be calculated according to the method prescribed for capital computation under
Reserve Bank of India (All India Financial Institutions - Prudential Norms on Capital
Adequacy) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to constitute both on and off-balance sheet exposures which shall be calculated according to the method prescribed for capital computation under reserve

controls.control_objective: To ensure be permitted to be offset with credit risk mitigation techniques permitted in reserve bank of india (all india financial institutions - prudential nor
controls.control_description:
The exposures shall be permitted to be offset with credit risk
mitigation techniques permitted in Reserve Bank of India (All India Financial Institutions -
Prudential Norms on Capital Adequacy) Directions, 2025, Off-balance sheet items shall be
converted into credit exposure equivalents through the use of credit conversion factors
(CCFs) by applying the CCFs set out the Reserve Bank of India (All India Financial
Institutions - Prudential Norms on Capital Adequacy) Directions, 2025, with a floor of 10
per cent.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be permitted to be offset with credit risk mitigation techniques permitted in reserve bank of india (all india financial institutions - prudential nor

controls.control_objective: To ensure also recognise an exposure to the crm provider
controls.control_description:
Where an AIFI reduces its exposure to the original counterparty on account of an eligible
CRM instrument provided by another counterparty (CRM provider) with respect to that
exposure, it shall also recognise an exposure to the CRM provider.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also recognise an exposure to the crm provider

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to the large exposure limit of 25 per cent of an aifi's tier 1 capital
controls.control_description:
The exposures to banks (excluding refinance exposure), except intra-day exposures,
shall be subject to the large exposure limit of 25 per cent of an AIFI's Tier 1 capital.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to be subject to the large exposure limit of 25 per cent of an aifi's tier 1 capital

controls.control_objective: To ensure assign such exposure amount to specific counterparties of the underlying assets following the lta described below
controls.control_description:
The AIFI shall assign such exposure amount to
specific counterparties of the underlying assets following the LTA described below.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to assign such exposure amount to specific counterparties of the underlying assets following the lta described below

controls.control_objective: To ensure be permitted to assign the exposure amount to the structure itself, defined as a distinct counterparty: provided that it can demonstrate that the aifi
controls.control_description:
The AIFI shall be permitted to assign the exposure amount to the structure itself, defined
as a distinct counterparty:
Provided that it can demonstrate that the AIFI's exposure amount to each underlying asset
of the structure is smaller than 0.25 per cent of its eligible capital base, considering only
those exposure to underlying assets that result from the investment in the structure itself
and using the exposure value calculated according to paragraphs 35 and 36.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be permitted to assign the exposure amount to the structure itself, defined as a distinct counterparty: provided that it can demonstrate that the aifi

controls.control_objective: To ensure look through the structure and in the case of underlying assets for which the underlying exposure value is equal to or above 0
controls.control_description:
The AIFI shall look through the structure and in the case of underlying assets for which
the underlying exposure value is equal to or above 0.25 per cent of its eligible capital base,
the counterparty corresponding to each of the underlying assets shall be identified so that
these underlying exposures can be added to any other direct or indirect exposure to the
<image>
same counterparty.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to look through the structure and in the case of underlying assets for which the underlying exposure value is equal to or above 0

controls.control_objective: To ensure be assigned to the structure itself (i
controls.control_description:
0.25 per cent of the AIFI's eligible capital base shall be assigned to the structure itself (i.e.,
partial look-through is permitted).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be assigned to the structure itself (i

controls.control_objective: To ensure assign the total exposure amount to the structure itself, as a distinct counterparty
controls.control_description:
If the AIFI is unable to identify the underlying assets of a structure:
(1) where the total amount of an AIFI's exposures to a structure does not exceed 0.25
per cent of its eligible capital base, it shall assign the total exposure amount to the
structure itself, as a distinct counterparty.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to assign the total exposure amount to the structure itself, as a distinct counterparty

controls.control_objective: To ensure assign this total exposure amount to the 'unknown client'
controls.control_description:
(2) Otherwise (i.e., if the exposure to the structure equals or exceeds 0.25 per cent of
its eligible capital base), it shall assign this total exposure amount to the 'unknown
client'.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to assign this total exposure amount to the 'unknown client'

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply on the aggregate of all such exposures to 'unknown clients' as if they are a single counterparty
controls.control_description:
Provided that the exposure limits shall apply on the aggregate of all such exposures
to 'unknown clients' as if they are a single counterparty.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply on the aggregate of all such exposures to 'unknown clients' as if they are a single counterparty

controls.control_objective: To ensure demonstrate that regulatory arbitrage considerations have not influenced the decision whether to look through or not - e
controls.control_description:
Where the LTA is not required (paragraph 30 above), the AIFI shall demonstrate that
regulatory arbitrage considerations have not influenced the decision whether to look
through or not - e.g.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to demonstrate that regulatory arbitrage considerations have not influenced the decision whether to look through or not - e

controls.control_objective: To ensure be the nominal amount it invests in the structure
controls.control_description:
If LTA need not be applied, an AIFI's exposure to the structure shall be the nominal
amount it invests in the structure.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be the nominal amount it invests in the structure

controls.control_objective: To ensure assign an exposure of ₹0
controls.control_description:
Thus, an AIFI holding a ₹1 investment in a structure,
which invests in 20 assets each with a value of ₹5, shall assign an exposure of ₹0.05 to
each of the counterparties.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to assign an exposure of ₹0

controls.control_objective: To ensure be added to any other direct or indirect exposures the aifi has to that counterparty
controls.control_description:
An exposure to such counterparty shall be added to any other
direct or indirect exposures the AIFI has to that counterparty.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be added to any other direct or indirect exposures the aifi has to that counterparty

controls.control_objective: To ensure be measured for each tranche within the structure, assuming a pro rata distribution of losses amongst investors in a single tranche
controls.control_description:
Any structure with different seniority levels among investors (e.g., securitisation
vehicles): When the LTA (in terms of sections above) is required for an investment in a
structure with different levels of seniority, the exposure value to a counterparty shall be
measured for each tranche within the structure, assuming a pro rata distribution of losses
amongst investors in a single tranche.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be measured for each tranche within the structure, assuming a pro rata distribution of losses amongst investors in a single tranche

controls.control_objective: To ensure : <image> (1) first, consider the lower of the value of the tranche in which the aifi has invested and the nominal value of each underlying asset incl
controls.control_description:
To compute the exposure value to the underlying
asset, an AIFI shall:
<image>
(1) first, consider the lower of the value of the tranche in which the AIFI has invested and
the nominal value of each underlying asset included in the underlying portfolio of assets
(2) second, apply the pro rata share of the AIFI's investment in the tranche to the value
determined in the first step above.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to : <image> (1) first, consider the lower of the value of the tranche in which the aifi has invested and the nominal value of each underlying asset incl

controls.control_objective: To ensure identify such third parties which may constitute an additional risk factor, and which are inherent in the structure itself rather than in the underlyi
controls.control_description:
Identification of additional risks:
(1) While taking exposures to structures, an AIFI shall identify such third parties which
may constitute an additional risk factor, and which are inherent in the structure itself
rather than in the underlying assets.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to identify such third parties which may constitute an additional risk factor, and which are inherent in the structure itself rather than in the underlyi

controls.control_objective: To ensure either include reduction in exposure or raising of additional capital
controls.control_description:
The RBI as a part of its Pillar 2 supervisory review and evaluation process will look
into this aspect and if required specify a specific course of action which may either
include reduction in exposure or raising of additional capital.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to either include reduction in exposure or raising of additional capital

controls.control_objective: To ensure consider multiple third parties to be potential drivers of additional risk
controls.control_description:
(2) It is conceivable that an AIFI may consider multiple third parties to be potential
drivers of additional risk.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to consider multiple third parties to be potential drivers of additional risk

controls.control_objective: To ensure assign the exposure resulting from the investment in the relevant structures to each of the third parties
controls.control_description:
In this case, the AIFI shall assign the exposure resulting
from the investment in the relevant structures to each of the third parties.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to assign the exposure resulting from the investment in the relevant structures to each of the third parties

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to the single and group of connected counterparty limits prescribed in paragraphs 11 and 12
controls.control_description:
An AIFI's exposure to NBFCs (excluding refinance exposure) shall be subject to the
single and group of connected counterparty limits prescribed in paragraphs 11 and 12.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be subject to the single and group of connected counterparty limits prescribed in paragraphs 11 and 12

controls.control_objective: To ensure be exempt from the large exposures framework
controls.control_description:
An AIFI's clearing exposure to QCCPs shall be exempt from the large exposures
framework.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be exempt from the large exposures framework

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to the regulatory reporting requirements as prescribed in paragraph 48
controls.control_description:
However, these exposures shall be subject to the regulatory reporting
requirements as prescribed in paragraph 48.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be subject to the regulatory reporting requirements as prescribed in paragraph 48

controls.control_objective: To ensure measure its exposure as a sum of both the clearing exposures described in paragraph 42 and the non-clearing exposures described in paragraph 43, and t
controls.control_description:
In the case of non-QCCPs, the AIFI shall measure its exposure as a sum of both the
clearing exposures described in paragraph 42 and the non-clearing exposures described
in paragraph 43, and the same shall be subject to the large exposure limit of 25 per cent of
the eligible capital base.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to measure its exposure as a sum of both the clearing exposures described in paragraph 42 and the non-clearing exposures described in paragraph 43, and t

controls.control_objective: To ensure identify exposures to a ccp related to clearing activities and sum together these exposures
controls.control_description:
An AIFI shall identify exposures to a CCP related to clearing activities and sum together
these exposures.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to identify exposures to a ccp related to clearing activities and sum together these exposures

controls.control_objective: To ensure determine the counterparty to which exposures shall be assigned by applying the provisions of the risk-based capital requirements
controls.control_description:
The AIFI shall determine the counterparty to which exposures shall be
assigned by applying the provisions of the risk-based capital requirements.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to determine the counterparty to which exposures shall be assigned by applying the provisions of the risk-based capital requirements

controls.control_objective: To ensure be calculated using the exposure measures prescribed in other parts of these directions for the respective type of exposures
controls.control_description:
Exposures
related to clearing activities are listed in the table below together with the exposure value
to be used:
Trade exposures The exposure value of trade exposures shall be
calculated using the exposure measures prescribed in
other parts of these Directions for the respective type of
exposures.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be calculated using the exposure measures prescribed in other parts of these directions for the respective type of exposures

controls.control_objective: To ensure be included as exposure to the ccp), funding facilities, credit facilities, guarantees etc
controls.control_description:
Other types of exposures that are not directly related to clearing services provided by
the CCP, such as equity stake (If equity stakes in a CCP are deducted from the capital on
which the large exposure limit is based, these shall not be included as exposure to the
CCP), funding facilities, credit facilities, guarantees etc., shall be measured according to
the rules set out in this framework, as for any other type of counterparty.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be included as exposure to the ccp), funding facilities, credit facilities, guarantees etc

controls.control_objective: To ensure undertake an annual review of the implementation of exposure management measures and place the same before its board by the end of june (september in
controls.control_description:
The AIFI shall undertake an annual review of the implementation of exposure
management measures and place the same before its Board by the end of June
(September in the case of NHB).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to undertake an annual review of the implementation of exposure management measures and place the same before its board by the end of june (september in

controls.control_objective: To ensure be forwarded to the concerned office of department of supervision
controls.control_description:
A copy of the review report shall be forwarded to the
concerned office of Department of Supervision.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be forwarded to the concerned office of department of supervision

controls.control_objective: To ensure be under exceptional conditions beyond the control of an aifi, and needs to be rectified immediately
controls.control_description:
Breach of exposure limits, if any, shall be under exceptional conditions beyond the
control of an AIFI, and needs to be rectified immediately.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be under exceptional conditions beyond the control of an aifi, and needs to be rectified immediately

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reported to rbi (department of supervision, central office) immediately
controls.control_description:
The breaches shall be reported
to RBI (Department of Supervision, Central Office) immediately.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reported to rbi (department of supervision, central office) immediately

controls.control_objective: To ensure be) until it is brought down within the limit
controls.control_description:
The AIFI, if under breach of exposure limits, cannot undertake any further exposure (at
the entity or group level, as the case may be) until it is brought down within the limit.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to be) until it is brought down within the limit

controls.control_objective: To ensure lead to imposition of penalties on the aifi by the supervisor
controls.control_description:
Failure to comply with the exposure limit may lead to imposition of penalties on the AIFI
by the supervisor.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to lead to imposition of penalties on the aifi by the supervisor

controls.control_objective: To ensure report its large exposures to the rbi (dos, co) as per the reporting template given in annex i on a monthly basis
controls.control_description:
The AIFI shall report its Large Exposures to the RBI (DOS, CO) as per the reporting
template given in Annex I on a monthly basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to report its large exposures to the rbi (dos, co) as per the reporting template given in annex i on a monthly basis

controls.control_objective: To ensure cover the following: (1) all exposures, meeting the definition of large exposure
controls.control_description:
The reporting shall cover the following:
(1) All exposures, meeting the definition of large exposure.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to cover the following: (1) all exposures, meeting the definition of large exposure

controls.control_objective: To ensure consider fixing internal limits for aggregate commitments to specific sectors e
controls.control_description:
In addition to limiting exposures to a single borrower or a group of borrowers, an AIFI
shall consider fixing internal limits for aggregate commitments to specific sectors e.g.,
textiles, chemicals, engineering, etc., to ensure diversified sectoral exposure.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to consider fixing internal limits for aggregate commitments to specific sectors e

controls.control_objective: To ensure be fixed based on the aifi's assessment of perceived risks and performance of different sectors
controls.control_description:
These
sectoral limits shall be fixed based on the AIFI's assessment of perceived risks and
performance of different sectors.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be fixed based on the aifi's assessment of perceived risks and performance of different sectors

controls.control_objective: To ensure review and revise these limits periodically, as deemed appropriate
controls.control_description:
The AIFI shall review and revise these limits periodically,
as deemed appropriate.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to review and revise these limits periodically, as deemed appropriate

controls.control_objective: To ensure be guided by the reserve bank of india (all india financial institutions - prudential norms on capital adequacy) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
An AIFI shall be guided by the Reserve Bank of India (All India Financial Institutions -
Prudential Norms on Capital Adequacy) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be guided by the reserve bank of india (all india financial institutions - prudential norms on capital adequacy) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure include both its direct and indirect exposures and shall constitute of the following: (1) direct investment in equity shares, convertible bonds, conve
controls.control_description:
An AIFI's aggregate capital market exposure shall include both its direct and indirect
exposures and shall constitute of the following:
(1) direct investment in equity shares, convertible bonds, convertible debentures and
units of equity-oriented mutual funds the corpus of which is not exclusively invested
in corporate debt;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include both its direct and indirect exposures and shall constitute of the following: (1) direct investment in equity shares, convertible bonds, conve

controls.control_objective: To ensure exceed 40 per cent of its net worth, as on march 31 of the previous year
controls.control_description:
The aggregate exposure of an AIFI to the capital markets in all forms (both fund based
and non-fund based, direct and indirect), on solo as well as consolidated basis shall not
exceed 40 per cent of its net worth, as on March 31 of the previous year.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to exceed 40 per cent of its net worth, as on march 31 of the previous year

controls.control_objective: To ensure exceed 20 per cent of its net worth
controls.control_description:
Provided that the AIFI's direct exposure within this overall ceiling shall not exceed 20 per
cent of its net worth.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to exceed 20 per cent of its net worth

controls.control_objective: To ensure exceed 49 per cent of the equity of the investee company
controls.control_description:
An AIFI's equity investment in a single company that is made in conformity with its
statutory mandate shall not exceed 49 per cent of the equity of the investee company.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to exceed 49 per cent of the equity of the investee company

controls.control_objective: To ensure hold more than 10 per cent of the equity of the investee company as direct investment
controls.control_description:
Provided that in all other cases, the AIFI shall not hold more than 10 per cent of the equity
of the investee company as direct investment.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to hold more than 10 per cent of the equity of the investee company as direct investment

controls.control_objective: To ensure be permitted to hold up to 49 per cent of equity of a company as a pledgee
controls.control_description: An AIFI shall be permitted to hold up to 49 per cent of equity of a company as a pledgee.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be permitted to hold up to 49 per cent of equity of a company as a pledgee

controls.control_objective: To ensure be brought down below 10 per cent limit within 3 years
controls.control_description:
Provided that if the AIFI ends up acquiring this in satisfaction of its claims, it shall be brought
down below 10 per cent limit within 3 years.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to be brought down below 10 per cent limit within 3 years

controls.control_objective: To ensure exceed 10 per cent of the aifi's net worth as on march 31 of the previous year
controls.control_description:
An AIFI's aggregate investment in equity of non-financial / commercial enterprises,
other than that covered under paragraph 53, shall not exceed 10 per cent of the AIFI's net
worth as on March 31 of the previous year.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to exceed 10 per cent of the aifi's net worth as on march 31 of the previous year

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the freedom to adopt a lower ceiling for the aifi, keeping in view its overall risk profile and corporate strategy
controls.control_description:
Provided that the Board of the AIFI shall have the freedom to adopt a lower ceiling for the
AIFI, keeping in view its overall risk profile and corporate strategy.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to have the freedom to adopt a lower ceiling for the aifi, keeping in view its overall risk profile and corporate strategy

controls.control_objective: To ensure be exempted from the capital market exposure limits: (1) an aifi's investments in own subsidiaries, joint ventures, state finance corporations (sfcs)
controls.control_description:
The following items shall be exempted from the capital market exposure limits:
(1) An AIFI's investments in own subsidiaries, joint ventures, State Finance
Corporations (SFCs) and investments in shares and convertible debentures,
convertible bonds issued by institutions forming crucial financial infrastructure such
as Acuité Ratings & Research Limited (Acuité), India SME Technology Services Ltd
(ISTSL), India SME Asset Reconstruction Company Ltd (ISARC), North Eastern
Development Finance Corporation Ltd (NeDFi), National Securities Depository Ltd.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be exempted from the capital market exposure limits: (1) an aifi's investments in own subsidiaries, joint ventures, state finance corporations (sfcs)

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reckoned with reference to sanctioned limits or outstanding, whichever is higher
controls.control_description:
For computing the exposure to the capital markets, loans / advances sanctioned shall
be reckoned with reference to sanctioned limits or outstanding, whichever is higher.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reckoned with reference to sanctioned limits or outstanding, whichever is higher

controls.control_objective: To ensure reckon the outstanding as the exposure
controls.control_description:
Provided that in the case of fully drawn term loans, where there is no scope for re-drawal
of any portion of the sanctioned limit, an AIFI shall reckon the outstanding as the exposure.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to reckon the outstanding as the exposure

controls.control_objective: To ensure be calculated at their cost price
controls.control_description:
The AIFI's direct investment in shares, convertible bonds, convertible debentures and
units of equity-oriented mutual funds shall be calculated at their cost price.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be calculated at their cost price

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to remain repealed
controls.control_description:
The Directions, instructions and guidelines already repealed
shall continue to remain repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to remain repealed

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be governed by the provisions thereof
controls.control_description:
Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken, or
initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall continue to be
governed by the provisions thereof.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to be governed by the provisions thereof

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed as governed by these directions
controls.control_description:
All approvals or acknowledgments granted under these
repealed lists shall be deemed as governed by these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed as governed by these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder

controls.control_objective: To ensure be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline
controls.control_description:
and any such
investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may be instituted, continued, or enforced
and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those
directions, instructions, or guidelines had not been repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations or directions, for the time being in force
controls.control_description:
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation of the
provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations or directions, for the time being in force.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations or directions, for the time being in force

controls.control_objective: To ensure be final and binding
controls.control_description:
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order to
remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of these
Directions, the RBI may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary clarifications in respect
of any matter covered herein and the interpretation of any provision of these Directions
given by the RBI shall be final and binding.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be final and binding
